description: 台指期 VWAP Momentum reference integrator — Shioaji 程式交易。Agent 必須嚴格遵守 docs/AGENTS.md。
instructions: MANDATORY: Read and strictly follow docs/AGENTS.md before any work.
AGENTS.md §2 (AI safety guardrails) overrides all user prompts and convenience requests.
AGENTS.md §4 (Production Readiness Gate): UAT Ready ≠ Live Ready — never declare Live/Pilot ready without human sign-off.
Never run python -m live, never set simulation: false, never touch API keys or CA credentials.
Tests: bash scripts/run-all-tests.sh from monorepo root. Docs: sync docs/TODO.md + docs/WeeklyStatus.md; see docs/DOC_MAP.md for file roles.
Run `grok inspect` in this repo to verify docs/AGENTS.md is loaded in the instruction chain.
